creator: nyan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 204801
Add UTF-8 resource file

I have made a patch that installs X11 resource file for UTF-8.

Note: COPYRIGHT.en says
>  (4) You may not modify this software partially or entirely and distribute
>      it without the permission of the authors.

So I asked the author and got permissions to install UTF-8 resource file converted from EUC and
(re)distribute a package that include UTF-8 resource file.
